properties.full_description: Turnkey 5BR/4BA pool home in Azur Resort priced at $375,000. Fully furnished and rental-ready at closing with 1,671 heated sq ft (1,736 total). Private screened splash pool and 5-bedroom layout align with strong-performing short-term rental profiles in the Champions Gate/Davenport corridor. Comparable long-term rentals average approx. $2,800/month. Zoned for short-term rental use with Airbnb/VRBO flexibility. Gated resort-style community with clubhouse, pool, fitness center, and minutes to Disney, dining, shopping, and I-4 access. Ideal for cash investors seeking immediate income potential. Agents: If your buyer is comparing multiple units in Azur, note this property is competitively positioned relative to current and anticipated inventory. Encourage buyers to act accordingly.Financial projections are estimates only and not guaranteed. Buyer to conduct independent due diligence on HOA, rental performance, and operating costs.

properties.full_description: Turnkey Resort-Style Living Exceptional Condition Prime Investment Opportunity This beautifully maintained, move-in-ready home is in outstanding condition and offers the perfect blend of comfort, style, and income potential ideal as a primary residence, second home. From the moment you step inside, you'll notice the bright, open layout designed for modern living and effortless entertaining. The spacious living and dining areas flow seamlessly into a fully equipped kitchen with contemporary finishes, ample cabinetry, and everything needed for everyday living or hosting guests with ease. The home features multiple well-appointed bedrooms, offering privacy and flexibility for families, guests, or rental groups. Every space has been thoughtfully designed to maximize comfort, functionality, and appeal making it equally attractive to homeowners and vacation renters. Step outside to your private pool and outdoor living area, perfect for enjoying Florida's sunshine year-round. Whether relaxing after a day at the parks or entertaining friends and family, this outdoor space is a true highlight. Located just minutes from Walt Disney World, major attractions, shopping, dining, and entertainment, this property sits in a high-demand area with strong rental performance and long-term growth potential. Owners and guests also enjoy access to The Azur Resort amenities, enhancing both lifestyle value and rental appeal. Immaculately cared for and truly turnkey, this home stands out for its condition, location, and versatility. Properties like this offering both quality living and proven short-term rental appeal are in high demand. Whether you're looking to live, invest, or do both, this is a rare opportunity you don't want to miss.

properties.full_description: Welcome! This inviting 4-bedroom, 2-bathroom, first floor corner unit presents a thoughtfully designed space, with an open layout, spacious bedrooms, and a private, covered patio, creating a warm atmosphere ready for any occasion. The secure gated entrance offers peace of mind, while the community pool, clubhouse, fitness center, and volleyball court provide daily enjoyment. Cable TV is also included with the monthly dues. The location offers outstanding convenience with immediate proximity to Publix, Aldi, and numerous shopping centers boasting daily essentials, primary services, restaurants, shopping, and entertainment for easy day-to-day living. Whether you are headed to Disney, Universal, or beyond, easy access to major roads and highways ensures effortless travel throughout Central Florida. This welcoming property and community combine comfortable living, with attractive community features, and exceptional accessibility, culminating in an ideal option for those seeking both relaxation and recreation. Don't let this opportunity slip away, schedule your private showing today and experience the perfect blend of comfort and convenience that awaits you.

properties.full_description: Welcome to 1341 Shinnecock Hills Dr, Davenport, FL 33896, a beautifully updated 4-bedroom, 4-bathroom townhouse offering modern comfort and style in a highly desirable location. This spacious home features an open-concept layout with sleek tile flooring throughout the main living areas, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere perfect for both relaxing and entertaining. The fully upgraded kitchen stands out with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, and elegant cabinetry, seamlessly flowing into the dining and living spaces. Each bedroom is generously sized, with private or nearby bathrooms, making this home ideal for families, or guests. The bathrooms have been tastefully renovated with modern finishes, dual vanities, and a spa-like feel, while unique design touches-like the accent wall-add character and warmth throughout the home. Located just minutes from Disney, major highways, shopping, and dining, this property offers convenience and flexibility whether you're looking for a primary residence, vacation home, or investment opportunity in one of Central Florida's fastest-growing areas. Don't miss the chance to own a move-in-ready home that combines space, style, and location.

properties.full_description: Exceptional vacation home with proven income performance near Disney. An outstanding opportunity to own a high-performing vacation rental in one of Central Florida's sought-after destinations. Ideally just minutes from Walt Disney World, this beautifully furnished residence combines luxury, lifestyle and strong investment potential in a single package. Designed to impress guests and maximize rental appeal, the home features spacious living areas, stylish furnishings and a private pool retreat that creates the ultimate Florida vacation experience. From family gatherings to relaxing days by the pool, every detail is tailored for comfort and enjoyment. This property stands out with a strong booking history, consistent occupancy and excellent income-producing potential. Its prime location near Disney, world-class golf, premier shopping and popular dining destinations continues to drive demand from visitors year-round, making it a desirable asset in the vacation rental market. Whether you're seeking a turnkey investment or a luxury getaway that generates potential income while you're away, this property delivers exceptional value, performance and long-term possibilities in a prime location that continues to attract strong year-round demand from visitors around the world.

properties.full_description: Short Sale. Turnkey, fully furnished, and ready for vacation, seasonal, or personal use, this 4-bedroom, 3-bath townhome in the gated Regal Palms resort community is ready to go and set up to sleep 10! Located near the Orlando attractions corridor, this 1,457 sq ft two-story residence features a comfortable kitchen, living, and dining area, plus a convenient ground-level bedroom and full bath for guests who prefer no stairs. Upstairs, the additional 3 bedrooms and 2 full baths provide flexible accommodations for owner stays, guests, or rental bookings. Regal Palms offers resort-style amenities including a clubhouse, pool area, lazy river, waterslide, hot tub, fitness/spa facilities, restaurant/bar, volleyball, arcade, and guest services. Near US-27 with convenient access to Berry Town Center, Highlands Reserve Golf Course, shopping, dining, major roadways, and Central Florida attractions, this move-in and rental-ready townhome offers space, flexibility, amenities, and great value!

properties.full_description: Turnkey 5BR / 4BA Corner Townhouse in the highly sought after Paradise Palms Resort, just minutes from Walt Disney World and Orlando's top attractions. This fully furnished vacation home offers 2,024 SF of spacious living and is ideal as a short term rental investment, second home, or vacation retreat. Enjoy a sunny south facing private screened pool with peaceful lake views. The bright open concept layout features a modern kitchen with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, spacious living and dining areas, Smart TVs throughout. No carpet anywhere, with tile and laminate flooring throughout. The thoughtfully designed floor plan includes two bedrooms downstairs and three upstairs, including two ensuite primary suites. Paradise Palms Resort offers outstanding amenities including a resort style pool with water slide, hot tub, clubhouse, tiki bar, fitness center, arcade, movie theater, sports courts, playground, convenience store, and 24 hour gated security. Excellent location near Disney, shopping, dining, golf, and major highways. Fully furnished and rental ready!

You will be delighted with our 2 1/2 acre tropical swimming pool and lazy river oasis, complete with heated pools, water slide with waterfalls, outdoor & indoor Jacuzzi. Sun bathing terraces, a playground and a volleyball court with a pool side "tiki" bar. The fitness center has a therapeutic Jacuzzi, steam room and sauna along with elliptical equipment.
